name: Academic
description_short: Merriam-Webster is a dictionary publisher, not a financial services company. This profile cannot be completed as Academic is miscategorized.
description_long: Academic is not a consumer finance company. The website provided (https://www.merriam-webster.com/dictionary/academic) is the Merriam-Webster Dictionary definition page for the word 'academic,' established in 1828 as a reference publisher. The page contains only lexicographic content: definitions, pronunciation guides, synonyms, etymology, usage examples, and word history. There are no financial products, services, lending terms, APR rates, or consumer finance offerings of any kind present on this page. The current categorization of 'Academic' as a 'payday-alternatives' lender is factually incorrect and appears to be a data entry error. No company by this name appears to operate in the consumer finance space based on the provided URL. The website is purely educational reference material explaining what the word 'academic' means in English, with no commercial financial services component. Without a valid company website or accurate business information, a legitimate financial profile cannot be constructed. Any attempt to fabricate financial services, lending products, or consumer terms would violate the requirement to base all information exclusively on website content.
